log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Earth Genasi — Unarmored Caster (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Earth Genasi — Unarmored Caster
→ Bite: [d20:10+10=20 vs AC 15] HIT! 19 damage. Earth Genasi — Unarmored Caster HP: 48/67
→ Bite: [d20:4+10=14 vs AC 15] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:10+10=20 vs AC 15] HIT! 21 damage. Earth Genasi — Unarmored Caster HP: 27/67
--- Earth Genasi — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 27/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:8+4=12 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
